aboutPanel.title: About
aboutPanel.description: An OpenAEC-style desktop application for pile planning, project input sources, and IFCPP project files.
aboutPanel.companyDescription: The built environment belongs to everyone. The OpenAEC Foundation develops and maintains free, open-source software for architecture, engineering and construction — so that knowledge and tools are shared, not locked away. Our core values: Open by default · Build together · Own your tools · Ship it.
aboutPanel.copyright: © 2026 OpenAEC Foundation. Code: LGPL-3.0-or-later. Content: CC BY-SA 4.0.

importPanel.title: Import sources
importPanel.fromFileDesc: Import load points, CPT locations, and foundation advice into the project.
importPanel.fromTemplateDesc: Review how source columns connect to the project model. Full source management follows later.

openPanel.title: Open project
openPanel.intro: Open an IFCPP project from this device or continue with a recent project.
openPanel.chooseProjectDesc: Open a complete Pile Plan Studio project file.

exportPanel.title: Export project data
exportPanel.intro: Choose a project file or a standard pile plan table for further use.
exportPanel.ifcppDesc: Save the complete project, settings, source data, and current choices.
exportPanel.excelDesc: Export all load points with their selected pile configuration and CPT selection.
exportPanel.csvDesc: Export the same standard table in a simple, open text format.
exportPanel.error: The export could not be created.
